outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Emits when popover open state changes

methods.name: _refreshTriggerListeners
methods.description: Refresh listeners on trigger element events

methods.name: applyNewPosition
methods.description:
Method called to change position of popover,
recommended to be used only when popover is opened, otherwise change position or cdkPlacement

methods.name: deactivate
methods.description:
This method is intended to be called in order
to postpone the main functionality but be able
to enable it back in the future by initialise()

methods.name: initialise
methods.signature: (triggerElement: HTMLElement | ElementRef<any>, config?: PopoverConfig, templateData?: null | TemplateRef<void> | PopoverTemplate) => void
methods.description:
Method initialising the popover service - should be called, after view is initialised, params:
- triggerElement - element, which is equivalent for cdkOverlayOrigin, or fd-popover-control,
  by default to this element the popover body will lbe appended and events on this element will trigger
  popover's  toggle
- config - configuration object using PopoverConfig interface
- templateData - in case of having already PopoverBodyComponent, there is way to pass container, template containing
  PopoverComponent and PopoverComponent instance

methods.name: refreshConfiguration
methods.description: Method that sets configuration/options, it detects if there is something changed and overwrites them

methods.name: refreshPosition
methods.description: Method called to refresh position of opened popover

methods.name: setIgnoreTriggers
methods.description: Temporary sets the ignoring of the event triggers.

methods.name: toggle
methods.signature: (openAction: boolean, closeAction: boolean, focusActiveElement?: boolean) => void

methods.name: updateContent
methods.signature: (stringContent: null | string | TemplateRef<any>, templateContent: Nullable<TemplateRef<any>>) => void
methods.description: method updating template or text inside rendered PopoverBody

methods.name: updateTriggerElement
methods.description: Updates trigger element and refreshes the listeners.
